message:
test(fcp-core,fcp-oauth,fcp-webhook): add comprehensive provisioning, OAuth2, and webhook tests

fcp-core/provisioning: Add MockProvisioner implementing full provisioning
lifecycle (recipe execution, approval flow, secret prompting, webhook
registration, step logging) with comprehensive test coverage.

fcp-oauth/oauth2: Add wiremock-based tests for authorization code exchange,
token refresh, error handling, and PKCE flow verification against mock
OAuth2 server endpoints.

fcp-webhook: Add webhook registration challenge-response flow tests,
event routing subscription tests, and provider-specific verification
tests using wiremock mock servers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
